task_completion.description: Create the required layers with specific colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD shows 'SWITCH_CUTS' (red color indicator), 'PLATE_OUTLINE' (white/black indicator), and 'MOUNTING_HOLES' (cyan indicator).

task_completion.description: Draw 6 square switch cutouts in a 3x2 grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main drawing area shows 6 distinct squares arranged in 3 columns and 2 rows. They should be drawn in red (on the SWITCH_CUTS layer).

task_completion.description: Draw the outer boundary of the mounting plate
task_completion.visual_evidence: A larger rectangle enclosing the 6 squares is visible in the drawing area, drawn in white/black (on the PLATE_OUTLINE layer).

task_completion.description: Apply fillets to the corners of the plate outline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The four corners of the outer boundary rectangle are rounded (filleted) rather than sharp 90-degree angles.

task_completion.description: Draw 4 circular mounting holes near the corners
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four small circles are visible inside the outer boundary, positioned near each of the four corners. They should be drawn in cyan (on the MOUNTING_HOLES layer).

task_completion.description: Save the file as macropad_plate.dxf in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar or a save dialog shows 'macropad_plate.dxf' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the design
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with LibreCAD's drawing tools, layer manager, and command line interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste DXF code into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are shown containing raw DXF code.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to generate the DXF file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows show the execution of Python or shell scripts designed to automatically generate the DXF file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a DXF file in LibreCAD with three specific layers: SWITCH_CUTS (Red), PLATE_OUTLINE (White), and MOUNTING_HOLES (Cyan). The design must feature 6 square cutouts (14x14mm) in a 3x2 grid (19.05mm pitch), an outer boundary with 6mm margin and 3mm corner fillets, and 4 circular mounting holes (3.2mm diameter) near the corners. The file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/macropad_plate.dxf.
